indicators.name: large sofa
indicators.rationale: A large sofa is the primary social seating artifact, accommodating multiple people comfortably.

indicators.name: several armchairs
indicators.rationale: Armchairs arranged opposite the sofa create a sociopetal layout, enabling natural eye contact.

indicators.name: central coffee table
indicators.rationale: A central shared surface within reach of all seats allows drinks, snacks, and objects to be shared during conversation.

indicators.name: rug defining seating area
indicators.rationale: A rug visually anchors the conversational cluster, creating a sense of enclosed social space.

indicators.name: U-shaped seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The U-shaped arrangement with seats facing inward is the classic sociopetal configuration optimised for group conversation.

indicators.name: soft lighting
indicators.rationale: Soft ambient lighting creates a relaxed, social atmosphere rather than a task-oriented one.

reasoning_summary: This living room has excellent conversational affordance through its sociopetal seating arrangement, central coffee table, and soft ambient lighting. The U-shaped cluster with sofa and armchairs is the ideal topology for casual hangouts. A score of 7 would require additional social props such as drinks accessories; this room is just below peak.
